verify.cmd: pnpm tsc --noEmit && pnpm vitest run tests/core-algebra
verify.summary: tsc clean; 41/41 core-algebra tests pass; both examples (hello, parallel-build) compile via roadmap make

notes: Resolver derives ordering exclusively from consumes ↔ produces; throws UnresolvedConsumesError on dangling consumes. tasksToDAG no longer reads ParsedTask.depends — predecessors derived from consumes/produces; ParsedTask.depends marked deprecated but retained for API compat. core/order.ts unchanged: it consumes the engine's deps field, which tasksToDAG now populates from the consumes-derived predecessor map.
